holdings.infoBox: AOTG is an equity ETF with a total of 43 individual holdings. The top holdings are Advanced Micro Devices stock at 15.46%, NVIDIA at 10.78%, Micron Technology at 10.38%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 7.24%, and Toast at 4.68%.

overview.description: The AOT Growth and Innovation ETF (AOTG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively invests in a growth portfolio of low marginal cost companies in the US. Stocks are selected based on proprietary fundamental research and criteria. AOTG was launched on Jun 29, 2022 and is issued by Alpha Architect.
